## Runtime.IRuntimeRecipe.ingredients property

Gets resolved ingredients from the golden version. Convenience method - same as goldenVersion.ingredients

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly ingredients: ReadonlyArray<IResolvedRecipeIngredient<IRuntimeIngredient>>;
```
